subject: Data Fix Complete + FE Venue Field Consistency Issue
body:
## Fixed: VICKY'S 70th BIRTHDAY PARTY Event

Event ID: `6992c09fd7738f471b9a25c9`

I fixed the data — the event had THREE inconsistent venue fields:

| Field | Before | After |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `venueID` | `680c5122...` ✅ | `680c5122...` ✅ |
| `locationID` | `6984d7b3...` ❌ | `680c5122...` ✅ |
| `venueId` (camelCase) | `6984d7b3...` ❌ | `680c5122...` ✅ |

All three now point to Dance Union.

## FE Issue to Address

The FE modal fallback logic:
```javascript
venueID: cleanedEventData.venueId || cleanedEventData.venueID || cleanedEventData.locationID
```

This picked up the orphaned `venueId` (camelCase) value.

**Suggested FE fixes:**
1. Standardize on ONE venue field name (recommend `venueID` uppercase)
2. When loading event for edit, prioritize `venueID` over `venueId` and `locationID`
3. Consider removing/ignoring legacy field names in the modal

Ybotman should be able to edit the event now after refresh.

—Fulton
